title: Fishy Business
description: A simple mod which adds 19 new fish with cooking variants and new fisherman trades.
body:
**Fishy Business** is a **forge** mod which focuses on adding **more fishing**. The mod adds **19 different fish** species. Fishes are **biome dependent** so you'll not find every fish in the a River. Fish also have two different **cooked variants**. The variants are **Smoked** (Cooked in a smoker) and **Charred** (Cooked in a furnace). ![New Fishmerchant Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e666439b3019b4310599f1bd32b0e0adf27e54.png)It also adds some **fisherman villager** changes and another type of **villager** that is found out on the open sea. To know extra stuff **join the Discord**.
This mod is for people who wants to fill the world with some more variaty while fishing. The mod is made by only me and I'm currently pretty occupied but I will work on it if I have time. Some things I would like to add is for example fish entities, Fisher villages and some small stuff like more decorations. The mod is made with **MCreator** and does **not require** any **other mod** to function. **OBS!** If you find a bug please report it in my discord and I'll try to get around to fixing it :)
